sentences.target: Elle lit un conte aux enfants.

translations.fr: Elle lit un conte aux enfants.
translations.en: She reads a tale to the children.
translations.es: Ella lee un cuento a los niños.
translations.de: Sie liest den Kindern ein Märchen vor.
translations.it: Lei legge una fiaba ai bambini.
translations.zh-Hans: 她给孩子们读一个故事。
translations.yue: 佢讀個故仔俾啲小朋友聽。
translations.pt: Ela lê um conto para as crianças.
translations.vi: Cô ấy đọc một câu chuyện cho bọn trẻ.
translations.nl: Ze leest de kinderen een verhaal voor.
translations.hi: वह बच्चों को एक कहानी पढ़ती है।
translations.el: Αυτή διαβάζει ένα παραμύθι στα παιδιά.
translations.nb: Hun leser et eventyr for barna.
translations.sv: Hon läser en saga för barnen.
translations.ro: Ea le citește o poveste copiilor.
translations.da: Hun læser et eventyr for børnene.
translations.ja: 彼女は子どもたちにお話を読んでいる。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 3rd person singular feminine; functions as the subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive, selecting a direct object ('un conte') and an indirect object ('aux enfants').
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner introducing the direct object noun 'conte'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of the verb 'lit'.
Preposition 'à' contracted with plural article ('les'); introduces the indirect object phrase 'aux enfants' (recipient).
Common noun, plural; head of the prepositional complement of 'à' indicating recipients.

sentences.target: Je cherche un conte à la bibliothèque.
sentences.reading: /ʒə ʃɛʁʃ œ̃ kɔ̃t a la biblijɔtɛk/

translations.fr: Je cherche un conte à la bibliothèque.
translations.ipa: /ʒə ʃɛʁʃ œ̃ kɔ̃t a la biblijɔtɛk/
translations.en: I'm looking for a tale at the library.
translations.es: Busco un cuento en la biblioteca.
translations.de: Ich suche in der Bibliothek ein Märchen.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在图书馆找一个故事。
translations.yue: 我喺圖書館搵一個故仔。
translations.pt: Estou procurando um conto na biblioteca.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tìm một câu chuyện ở thư viện.
translations.nl: Ik zoek een verhaal in de bibliotheek.
translations.hi: मैं पुस्तकालय में एक कहानी ढूँढ़ रहा हूँ।
translations.nb: Jeg leter etter et eventyr på biblioteket.
translations.sv: Jag letar efter en saga på biblioteket.
translations.da: Jeg leder efter et eventyr på biblioteket.
translations.ja: 私は図書館でお話を探している。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive verb taking 'un conte' as direct object; locative PP 'à la bibliothèque' indicates place.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'conte' (direct object).
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'cherche'.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'bibliothèque'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'à' (location).

sentences.target: On écoute un conte au coin du feu.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ ekut œ̃ kɔ̃t o kwɛ̃ dy fø/

translations.fr: On écoute un conte au coin du feu.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ ekut œ̃ kɔ̃t o kwɛ̃ dy fø/
translations.en: We’re listening to a tale by the fire.
translations.es: Estamos escuchando un cuento junto a la chimenea.
translations.de: Wir hören am Kamin ein Märchen.
translations.it: Stiamo ascoltando una fiaba accanto al camino.
translations.ko: 우리는 난로 옆에서 이야기를 듣고 있다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在壁炉旁听一个故事。
translations.yue: 我哋喺壁爐旁邊聽故仔。
translations.pt: Estamos ouvindo um conto perto da lareira.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang nghe một câu chuyện bên lò sưởi.
translations.nl: We luisteren bij de haard naar een verhaal.
translations.hi: हम आग के पास एक कहानी सुन रहे हैं।
translations.el: Ακούμε ένα παραμύθι δίπλα στο τζάκι.
translations.nb: Vi lytter til et eventyr ved peisen.
translations.id: Kami mendengarkan dongeng di dekat perapian.
translations.sv: Vi lyssnar på en saga vid brasan.
translations.da: Vi lytter til et eventyr ved pejsen.
translations.ja: 私たちは暖炉のそばでお話を聞いている。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/collective subject pronoun; triggers 3rd person singular verb agreement.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive, taking 'un conte' as direct object; followed by locative PP 'au coin du feu'.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'conte'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'écoute'.
Preposition 'à' contracted with masculine singular article ('le'); introduces locative NP 'coin'.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the PP 'au coin'.
Preposition 'de' contracted with masculine singular article ('le'); introduces the complement 'du feu' specifying the corner.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'de' within the PP.

sentences.target: Nous écrivons un conte pour la classe.

translations.fr: Nous écrivons un conte pour la classe.
translations.en: We are writing a tale for class.
translations.es: Estamos escribiendo un cuento para la clase.
translations.de: Wir schreiben ein Märchen für den Unterricht.
translations.it: Stiamo scrivendo una fiaba per la classe.
translations.ko: 우리는 수업을 위해 이야기를 쓰고 있다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在为课堂写一个故事。
translations.yue: 我哋為咗課堂寫一個故仔。
translations.pt: Estamos escrevendo um conto para a aula.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang viết một câu chuyện cho lớp.
translations.nl: We schrijven een verhaal voor de les.
translations.hi: हम कक्षा के लिए एक कहानी लिख रहे हैं।
translations.el: Γράφουμε ένα παραμύθι για την τάξη.
translations.nb: Vi skriver et eventyr til klassen.
translations.sv: Vi skriver en saga till klassen.
translations.da: Vi skriver et eventyr til klassen.
translations.ja: 私たちは授業のためにお話を書いている。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person plural; subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; transitive, taking 'un conte' as direct object; followed by a purpose/beneficiary PP.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'conte'.

Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'pour'.
